title: Breaking Communication Barriers: How We Built a Smarter Slack-Monday Integration
excerpt: At Creative Bits and Creative Bits AI we love pushing the limits of what’s possible with Monday.com. Recently, a client approached us with a unique challenge—they wanted to close the communication loop between Monday.com …

posts.author: SirEric (Eric Maranga)
posts.cookedHtml:
At Creative Bits and Creative Bits AI we love pushing the limits of what’s possible with Monday.com. Recently, a client approached us with a unique challenge—they wanted to close the communication loop between Monday.com and Slack.

The Challenge

While Monday.com offers native Slack integration for posting updates, it lacks a crucial feature: the ability to sync replies from Slack back to Monday.com items. Our client needed:

  • Two-way communication between teams in Slack and Monday.com items
  • Privacy controls to keep sensitive board data secure
  • Seamless workflows without manual copying/pasting

Our Solution

We engineered a custom integration using:

A Slack bot to monitor channel replies

Make.com workflows to process and route messages

Monday.com’s API to update items dynamically

744×333 50.3 KB

How It Works:

A Monday.com update gets posted to Slack (via native integration)

Team members reply in Slack—even those without Monday.com access

Our Slack bot detects replies and sends them to Make.com

Make.com processes the message and updates the original Monday.com item

744×357 41.8 KB

Why This Matters

This solution demonstrates how custom integrations can extend Monday.com’s capabilities far beyond out-of-the-box features. Whether you need:

  • Client feedback loops
  • Cross-team collaboration
  • Secure external communication

The right integration strategy can make it happen.

Have you faced similar communication gaps? What tools would you like to see better integrated with Monday.com? Let’s discuss in the comments!

Cheers.
